content: The top running speed of a cheetah is approximately 120 km/h (75 mph), making it the fastest land animal on Earth. However, they can only sustain such high speeds for short bursts, typically while chasing prey. Over longer distances, their speed drops to around 80-100 km/h (50-62 mph).
raw_content: The top running speed of a cheetah is approximately 120 km/h (75 mph), making it the fastest land animal on Earth. However, they can only sustain such high speeds for short bursts, typically while chasing prey. Over longer distances, their speed drops to around 80-100 km/h (50-62 mph).
